lead.headline: Scott Pelley fired from ‘60 Minutes’ after confrontation with new boss - The Washington Post
lead.deck: The termination marks the latest shake-up during a tumultuous period for the iconic newsmagazine.
lead.body:
60 Minutes correspondent Scott Pelley was fired Tuesday, one day after a fiery confrontation with his new boss, executive producer Nick Bilton, according to two people familiar with the matter.
